title: The Commander Battles Intensify
description: On pages 13–16, this part focuses on Unknown person #13, Unknown person #14, Unknown person #15, Law, Unknown person #16 as The Skull Dome battles reach their final forms as Sanji, Zoro, Kid, Law, Yamato, and the alliance push back against the emperors and their commanders.
scene: The Skull Dome battles reach their final forms as Sanji, Zoro, Kid, Law, Yamato, and the alliance push back against the emperors and their commanders.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: So dinosaurs are basically like dragons...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Big Lizards with tough hides!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: You're not wrong,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: But I'm on another level!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Don't worry, I'll give you a chance and use my blade instead!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You're not the only one that craves a Good Duel!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Not a drop of blood after all those attacks.... He still has movable wings in this form. They're not just for show, but I haven't seen him fly with them.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And the flames on his back are still burning!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I thought he got those features from his devil fruit,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: But I guess not.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Does he have fishman or giant blood?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: No, it's probably a race I've never heard of.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: I don't think...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: ...I can win...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: ...without knowing what he is!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: PANT... PAINT...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: PANT... PAIT...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: ...?...? What's that sound...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: A shamisen?! No way!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Aaagh!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Emma...?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: DONE INTERIOR - TREASURE REPOSITORY

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Is that a shamisen...? That's absurd...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We're in a war zone. What kind of trick is this?

dialogue.speaker: Law
dialogue.text: It's coming from the next room...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Slide...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Ugh... It's Bright...!! Someone's here...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Is it an enemy?! Did they track me down?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: Коммента�:

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: GOD... am I dreaming?! or did I pass to the other side?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I've yearned for you every night since what happened!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: Couldn't get you out of my head.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: Likewise, my Lord. All I want...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...is for us to spend the rest of our lives together!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If this is a dream, I don't want to wake up!!

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War through 35 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on battle momentum, shifting alliances, and character resolve.
